source.section: 2.2 - Air-to-Ground Modes > 2.2.3 - EXP (Expanded) Modes > 2.2.3.2 - EXP2 (Patch Map)

steps.action: Make sure air-to-ground mapping (MAP) mode or EXP1 mode is selected (see previous sections).
steps.voiced: Confirm MAP or EXP1 mode is selected.

steps.action: Press the Sensor Control Switch in the direction of the radar screen (RIGHT) to slave the TDC (Throttle Designation Controller) to the current radar screen (diamond should be visible).
steps.voiced: Press Sensor Control Switch toward the radar screen — confirm TDC diamond appears.

steps.action: Press on the OSB (Option Select Button) next to EXP2.
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to EXP2.

steps.action: Press and hold TDC DEPRESS control (« ENTER »).
While TDC DEPRESS is held, slew the trapezoidal corral over the desired region you want to set as a patch map (zoom) using the TDC controls.
steps.voiced: While holding TDC DEPRESS, slew the corral over the desired patch region.

steps.action: Release the TDC DEPRESS control to enter EXP2 mode. Corral
steps.voiced: Release TDC DEPRESS to enter EXP2 patch map mode.
